topic.date_range_guidance: Prioritise 2015-2026. Use older authoritative multiplier/method sources only where still standard.
priority_venues: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management

database_search_strings.Scopus/WoS: (construction OR infrastructure OR "built asset") AND (job* OR employ* OR workforce OR FTE OR "job-years") AND (capex OR "economic impact" OR "jobs per million")
database_search_strings.Google Scholar: "jobs per million" construction capex OR "job-years" "economic impact"
database_search_strings.Australia grey lit: site:gov.au construction jobs economic impact capex PDF

topic.topic_title: Renewable energy jobs per dollar update and data-centre off-site prefab labour evidence
topic.research_goal: Two-topic combined search. (F) Update jobs-per-dollar, jobs-per-MW, job-years, and O&M employment for renewable energy, grid, storage, transmission, and energy efficiency with Australian context where possible — triangulate Green vs brown, Wei et al., NREL JEDI, IRENA, Clean Energy Council. (I) Find any project-level quantification of off-site prefabrication, modular MEP, power skids, cooling systems, and equipment manufacturing labour for data-centre projects. Classify sources as quantified project-level, quantified non-DC-specific, qualitative DC, or reject. Do not treat percentage on-site labour reductions as facility job coefficients without verification.
topic.role_descriptor: expert energy-workforce and modular construction evidence curator
